name: E2a
description: Authenticated email gateway for AI agents — receive emails as webhooks or WebSocket, send via HTTP API, and verify sender identity with HMAC-signed headers.

skills.name: Email Receive
skills.description: Receive inbound emails as webhooks (cloud) or WebSocket streams (local), with SPF/DKIM verification on every message.

skills.name: Email Send
skills.description: Send outbound emails to agents or humans via HTTP API with optional human-in-the-loop approval gates.

skills.name: Sender Identity Verification
skills.description: Verify the identity of every sender — human or AI agent — using HMAC-signed X-E2A-Auth-* delivery headers.

skills.name: Approval Gate
skills.description: Hold outbound mail for human review via dashboard, magic-link email, or CLI before delivery is triggered.
